positive: A highly detailed, symmetrical circular emblem featuring a majestic cosmic fox silhouette woven with constellations, crescent moons, and geometric celestial patterns. The style should be a blend of linocut woodblock print and neo-geometric art, using deep indigo blues, cosmic golds, and crisp midnight blacks. The composition must be centered, highly contrasting, and designed for perfect repetition on apparel. Emphasize clean, bold outlines and strong negative space, ensuring all elements read as clear silhouettes suitable for single-color printing. Perfect symmetry, highly intricate yet legible.
negative: text, logo, watermark, signature, artifacts, blurry, noise, grain, low detail, bad anatomy, extra limbs, distorted, gradients, photographic, realistic, messy lines
